title: loot shulkers
description: make it so any looting enchanment can affect how many shulker shells will drop
body:
Makes the Looting enchantment increase the number of shulker shells dropped when killing shulkers.                          

only supports fabric 1.20.1 im working on other versions
i may add a config soon idk but enjoy the mod:)
